title: France vs Senegal tactical preview
text: France project as the stronger possession side with elite wide forwards and midfield control. Senegal's best route is fast transition play through Mane and Jackson, with Koulibaly important in defending crosses and recovery runs.

title: France squad note
text: France's key attacking influence is Mbappe, whose pace and finishing strongly affect expected goals. Maignan improves defensive stability and reduces concession risk in close matches.

title: Norway vs Iraq player watch
text: Norway's attacking model depends on Odegaard chance creation and Haaland penalty-box finishing. Iraq are likely to defend compactly and rely on Aymen Hussein as a target forward.

title: Portugal vs Colombia overview
text: Portugal should create chances through Bruno Fernandes between the lines, while Colombia's threat comes from Luis Diaz attacking space behind fullbacks.
